creator: ruben@rubenkerkhof.com
text:
Collectd is logging this every few seconds:
Jul 19 15:23:02 stor2b collectd[801]: zfs_arc plugin: Reading kstat value "stolen" failed.

But this statistic doesn't exist:

root@stor2b:~ # sysctl -a | grep zfs | grep stolen
root@stor2b:~ # 


root@stor2b:~ # freebsd-version -uk
10.3-RELEASE-p4
10.3-RELEASE-p5

root@stor2b:~ # pkg version | grep collectd5
collectd5-5.5.1_4                  =

Installed from pkg, not ports.
